maturity.meaning: Structure exists; no owner-approved evidence has been analyzed yet.

incomplete_areas.area: Need conflict stories and high-stakes decisions.
Need evidence for worldview, lifeview, values and bottom lines, role and mission, methodology and facts, decision and tradeoff, people, business/customer, and expression/organization dimensions.
Need repeated reasoning traces and attribution examples.
Need decision cases with context, options, action, and outcome.
Need domain-specific operating models and repeated domain cases.
Need formal, informal, and spoken language samples.
Need authorization boundary, internal/external expression boundary, and escalation rules.
Need owner answers to high-impact confirmation questions.
Need holdout cases and evaluation samples.

evidence_maturity_report.final_disclosure: Do not equate schema completion with content maturity. Report maturity level, missing evidence, failed sources, and incomplete modules.
